offer: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 orders/month, inefficient inventory tracking causes stockouts. We automate inventory tracking and reordering instead of manual tracking using spreadsheets.
problem: Inefficient inventory tracking and reordering processes
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Etsy sellers
Indie Hackers discussions on inventory issues
DM outreach to Etsy sellers with demo video
Community forums for Etsy sellers sharing tools
try_it: Let users try Basic inventory tracking dashboard on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing inventory data
